prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The second Miss Grand Ecuador 2023 beauty pageant was held at TC Televisión Studios, Guayaquil, and was originally planned for January, but was postponed to April 15, 2023 for unknown reasons. The competition was judged by contestants from seven provinces who had qualified for the national event through a virtual audition performed earlier in November 2022. The grand final round was hosted by Eduardo Andrade, an Ecuadorian television presenter, radio host, and singer, and was live-streamed to the public broadcasted to the public via GrandTV
B. The second iteration of the Miss Grand Ecuador beauty competition, known as Miss Grand Ecuador 2023, took place at the TC Televisión Studios in Guayaquil. Although initially scheduled for January, it was rescheduled to April 15, 2023, due to reasons that were not disclosed. Participants representing seven different provinces of Ecuador, who had secured their spots in the national pageant through a virtual audition held in November 2022, vied for the prestigious title. This pageant was orchestrated by Concurso Nacional de Belleza Ecuador (CNB Ecuador), a pageant organizing entity based in Guayaquil and led by Tahiz and Miguel Panus. The culminating grand final round of the competition was presented by Eduardo Andrade, an Ecuadorian television personality, radio host, and vocalist. The event was broadcast live globally via GrandTV, the YouTube channel of its international parent competition, and was also graced by Miss.
C. Miss Grand Ecuador 2023 was the second edition of the Miss Grand Ecuador beauty pageant, held at TC Televisión Studios, Guayaquil. It was originally proposed to be held in January but was postponed to April 15, 2023, for unspecified reasons. Candidates from seven provinces of the country, who qualified for the national pageant via an audition performed virtually earlier in November 2022, competed for the title.The event was held by a Guayaquil-based pageant organizer headed by Tahiz and Miguel Panus, Concurso Nacional de Belleza Ecuador (CNB Ecuador). The grand final round of the pageant was hosted by an Ecuadorian television presenter, radio host, and singer, Eduardo Andrade, and was live-transmitted to the audience worldwide via its international parent contest's Youtube channel, GrandTV, and was also attended by Miss

Answer:

The event was broadcast live globally via GrandTV, the YouTube channel of its international parent competition, and was also graced by Miss.
